# Lyon

> Geotechnical engineering company in France, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amelioration](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/amelioration/)
- [Analyse Damplification Sismique](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/analyse-damplification-sismique/)
- [Analyse Geotechnique Tunnels Sols](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/analyse-geotechnique-tunnels-sols/)
- [Analyse Lerosion Sols](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/analyse-lerosion-sols/)
- [Analyse Pieux Frottement Lateral](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/analyse-pieux-frottement-lateral/)
- [Analyse Stabilite Pentes](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/analyse-stabilite-pentes/)
- [Analyse Tassement Differentiel](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/analyse-tassement-differentiel/)
- [Au Dilatometre Plat](https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/au-dilatometre-plat/)

## Contact
- Website: https://lyon.etudegeotechnique1.fr/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in France.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
